mapper.sql: select id, exec_record_id, task_id, node_key, node_name, assigned_team_id, assigned_user_id, claim_user_id, status, start_time, claim_time, complete_time, form_data, result, approve_comment, process_duration, timeout_flag, plan_end_date, plan_start_date, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from task_node_execution
mapper.select: where exec_record_id = #{execRecordId} order by create_time asc
mapper.insert:
insert into task_node_execution
exec_record_id, task_id, node_key, node_name, assigned_team_id, assigned_user_id, claim_user_id, status, start_time, claim_time, complete_time, form_data, result, approve_comment, process_duration, timeout_flag, plan_end_date, plan_start_date, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark,
#{execRecordId}, #{taskId}, #{nodeKey}, #{nodeName}, #{assignedTeamId}, #{assignedUserId}, #{claimUserId}, #{status}, #{startTime}, #{claimTime}, #{completeTime}, #{formData}, #{result}, #{approveComment}, #{processDuration}, #{timeoutFlag}, #{planEndDate}, #{planStartDate}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark},
mapper.delete:
delete from task_node_execution where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM ( SELECT tne.id, tne.status FROM task_node_execution tne WHERE (tne.claim_user_id = #{userId} OR tne.assigned_user_id = #{userId}) AND tne.status != 'cancelled' UNION SELECT tne.id, tne.status FROM task_node_execution tne INNER JOIN task_node_execution_handler h ON h.node_execution_id = tne.id WHERE h.user_id = #{userId} AND tne.status != 'cancelled' ) t GROUP BY status
SELECT tne.status, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM task_node_execution tne WHERE tne.assigned_team_id = #{teamId} AND tne.status != 'cancelled' GROUP BY tne.status
mapper.update: UPDATE task_node_execution SET status = 'cancelled' WHERE exec_record_id = #{execRecordId} AND status IN ('pending', 'claimed')
mapper.select: SELECT t.userId, u.nick_name AS userName, SUM(CASE WHEN t.status = 'pending' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pending, SUM(CASE WHEN t.status = 'claimed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS running, SUM(CASE WHEN t.status = 'completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS finished, COUNT(*) AS total FROM ( SELECT tne.id, tne.status, tne.claim_user_id AS userId FROM task_node_execution tne WHERE tne.assigned_team_id = #{teamId} AND tne.status != 'cancelled' AND tne.claim_user_id IS NOT NULL UNION SELECT tne.id, tne.status, h.user_id AS userId FROM task_node_execution tne INNER JOIN task_node_execution_handler h ON h.node_execution_id = tne.id WHERE tne.assigned_team_id = #{teamId} AND tne.status != 'cancelled' ) t LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.user_id = t.userId GROUP BY t.userId, u.nick_name
SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM task_node_execution WHERE status != 'cancelled' GROUP BY status

SELECT t.userId, u.nick_name AS userName, COUNT(*) AS finished FROM ( SELECT tne.id AS execId, tne.claim_user_id AS userId FROM task_node_execution tne WHERE tne.status = 'completed' AND tne.claim_user_id IS NOT NULL UNION SELECT tne.id AS execId, h.user_id AS userId FROM task_node_execution tne INNER JOIN task_node_execution_handler h ON h.node_execution_id = tne.id WHERE tne.status = 'completed' ) t LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.user_id = t.userId GROUP BY t.userId, u.nick_name ORDER BY finished DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT tne.id, tne.node_key AS nodeKey, tne.node_name AS nodeName, tne.status, tne.assigned_team_id AS assignedTeamId, tne.plan_end_date AS planEndDate, tne.timeout_flag AS timeoutFlag, ter.proc_inst_id AS procInstId, hv.TEXT_ AS taskName FROM task_node_execution tne JOIN task_execution_record ter ON ter.id = tne.exec_record_id LEFT JOIN ACT_HI_VARINST hv ON hv.PROC_INST_ID_ = ter.proc_inst_id AND hv.NAME_ = 'taskName' WHERE tne.status NOT IN ('completed', 'rejected', 'cancelled') AND ter.status = 'running' AND tne.task_id IS NOT NULL AND tne.plan_end_date IS NOT NULL AND tne.plan_end_date != '' AND tne.plan_end_date <= #{deadlineDate} ORDER BY tne.plan_end_date ASC
SELECT DISTINCT tne.task_id FROM task_node_execution tne WHERE tne.claim_user_id = #{claimUserId} AND tne.status IN ('submitted', 'completed') AND tne.task_id IS NOT NULL

SELECT node_name AS nodeName, process_duration AS duration FROM task_node_execution WHERE status = 'completed' AND process_duration IS NOT NULL AND process_duration > 0 ORDER BY node_name, process_duration

SELECT pt.team_name AS teamName, tne.process_duration AS duration FROM task_node_execution tne JOIN production_team pt ON pt.id = tne.assigned_team_id WHERE tne.status = 'completed' AND tne.process_duration IS NOT NULL AND tne.process_duration > 0 AND pt.team_status = '1' ORDER BY pt.team_name, tne.process_duration

SELECT pt.team_name AS teamName, COUNT(*) AS completedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN tw.id IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS onTimeCount FROM task_node_execution tne JOIN production_team pt ON pt.id = tne.assigned_team_id LEFT JOIN task_execution_record ter ON ter.id = tne.exec_record_id LEFT JOIN task_warning tw ON tw.proc_inst_id = ter.proc_inst_id AND tw.node_key = tne.node_key AND tw.warn_type = 'overdue' WHERE tne.status = 'completed' AND pt.team_status = '1' GROUP BY pt.team_name ORDER BY onTimeCount / COUNT(*) DESC

SELECT node_name AS nodeName, SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('pending', 'claimed') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS activeCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completedCount FROM task_node_execution WHERE status != 'cancelled' GROUP BY node_name ORDER BY completedCount DESC
